summary: Journey page right rail refinement tested successfully. All 22 features verified. Coach Watch card renders at top with headline, status pill, summary, 2x2 stats, recommended action, and CTAs ('Email Coach', 'Create Follow-up'). Signals toggle collapsed by default, expands on click showing max 2 signals. Key Contacts shows max 2 contacts with 'View all staff' toggle for overflow. Communication & Activity now uses 4-column compact grid (Outreach, Replies, Interactions, Last Active). School Insight is collapsed preview only (Engagement Outlook and Recruiting Timeline REMOVED). AI Assist renamed from 'AI Insights' with helper text under each button. Section hierarchy verified: Coach Watch > Key Contacts > Communication & Activity > School Insight > AI Assist.

issues: CORS warnings for external university logos (cosmetic only)

critical_code_review_comments: Coach Watch card correctly implements VERY HIGH emphasis with status pill, headline, summary, stats grid, recommendation, and dual CTAs
Key Contacts section correctly limits display to max 2 contacts with 'View all staff' toggle
Communication & Activity uses grid-cols-4 for compact 4-column layout (was 2x2)
School Insight section correctly shows just SchoolInsightCard (Engagement Outlook and Timeline cards removed)
AI Assist section renamed from 'AI Insights' with helper text underneath button labels
CoachWatchCard.js interpretSignals() limits recentSignals.slice(0, 2) ensuring max 2 signals shown
seed_data_creation: Used existing data - Stanford (0 outreach, no coaches), Emory (7 interactions, has data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey page right rail fully redesigned with 5 sections. Key test IDs: coach-watch-card, coach-watch-status-pill, coach-watch-headline, coach-watch-summary, coach-watch-stats, coach-watch-recommendation, coach-watch-ctas, coach-watch-email-btn, coach-watch-followup-btn, coach-watch-signals-toggle, coach-watch-signals-list, key-contacts-card, add-coach-btn, view-all-staff-btn, communication-activity-card, stat-outreach, stat-replies, stat-interactions, stat-last-active, school-insight-section, ai-section, ai-next-step-btn, ai-journey-summary-btn, ai-school-insight-btn. LOGIN WORKAROUND: Use page.evaluate with fetch('/api/auth/login') + localStorage.setItem then page.goto().
